notes: Game runs on 3.7-4, however mainly tested on 3.16-4. Both the regular game and the Assault DLC have been tested and both work, however have the same issues. Mouse input works but does not work correctly - input is all over the place and it is difficult to aim. Fixing this issue would give the game a Platinum rating. Audio works fine. Game does not have controller support.
title: Masked Shooters 2
